titleStmt.title: SII 36.127: original edition by P Shanmugam
No. 127. (A.R. No. 127 of 1910.) TEṈKARAI, NILAKKOTTAI TALUK, MADURA DISTRICT. On the north wall of the first prākāra in the Mūlasthānēśvara temple.

summary.p: Incomplete and much damaged. Records a grant of land measuring 1(1/2) pāḍagam to the temple of Mūlasthāṉam Uḍaiyār at Kaṭṭikkaḷḷūr in Teṉ Kallaga-nāḍu, a subdivision of Madurōdaya-vaḷanāḍu by Abhaiyapiḷḷaiyār Śrīkaṇḍan alias Tirumāliruñchōḻa Nambi, a resident of Tirupputtūr in the twelfth ward of Chōḻakulāntaka-chaturvēdimangalam, a brahmadēya in Pāgaṉūr-kūṟṟam.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī tirumakaḷ puṇarap pūmakaḷ [viḷaṅka vikkirama cayamakaḷ poṟpuyat tiruppa kanak(ā) meruviṟ] kayal viḷaiyāṭa
irunilattoru taṉiveṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟa Uyarumaṇimuṭi taṉṉurimaiyiṟ cūṭi nemi lavarai nta caruta
par veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟap poruntaṉ ṟkaḻalp paṟittup paṉittuṭaṉ kuṭuppa koṟṟa ku
nṟukku ci maṉṉar vañci ventaru maṇi neṭuvācalil ventarai yicaipayi veṅkali kaṭi
ḻ poḻil viṉṟi pāttipar mutali
kku r yaravinta mukatti nta pa motayiṟ ce
ntamiḻ cerntu maṉṉiya vīrasimhāsaṉattu Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya māmutal matikkulam viḷakki
ya komutaṟ komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī parākkirama pāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 8 vatu pākaṉūr kūṟṟattu brahma
deyam śrī coḻakulāntakac caturvvedimaṅkalattu paṉṉiraṇṭān ceri tirupputtūr bhāratāyaṉ śrī ka ṉ tirumāliru
ñcolai ṉeṉ maturotaya vaḷanāṭṭut teṉkallakaṉāṭṭuk kaṭṭikkaḷḷūr Uṭaiyār śrī mūlasthāna
muṭaiyār koyilil Uḻavaṭai ṟṟi ceri
ta nāḷ Im mutaṟ ceri tirupputtūrk
tiruvāni muṉ śrī vāsudevaṉ kāḷi dharmmadānam peṟṟuṭaiyaṉāy Aṉubhavittu vārāniṉṟa nilamāvatu carajhājanā
laya pilāṟṟukku meṟkumāka pāṭakam vatikku vaṭakku mutaṟ pāṭakamum Iraṇṭām pāṭakattu teṟkaṭaiya nilam Arai māvu
m Ākap pāṭakam Oṉṟaraiyum dharmadāṉamāka Aṭṭikkuṭutten Apaiyapiḷḷaiyār śrī kaṇṭaṉ tirumāliruñcolai [ nampi
ye] ṉ Ippaṭi nāṉ paṇṇikuṭutta tirumāliruñcolai ṇṭa samjñayāṉamaikku samjñamāṭṭu
ñ ceri parākramaṉ nārāyaṇa [ bhaṭṭaneṉ] En Eḻuttu Ippaṭi A ṉ tirupputtūr garatāyaṉ tiruvaraṅka nārāyaṇa bhaṭ[ ṭa
neṉ]
Digital edition of SII 36.127 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
